pi_items.source: Task description states '4 rooms'; setup_task.sh creates exactly 4 data rows (Alex, Blake, Casey, Drew); README.md confirms 4 rooms in data structure table
Task description states '$3,200'; setup_task.sh line 19 sets 'TOTAL:,,,,,3200'; README.md confirms 'Total monthly rent: $3,200'; verifier.py constant TOTAL_RENT = 3200.0
task.json 'difficulty' field set to 'medium'; README.md 'Difficulty': 🟡 Medium
setup_task.sh formula: '=C2*2.5'; README.md 'Square footage': 2.5 points per sq ft
setup_task.sh formula: 'F2*20'; README.md 'Floor level': +20 points per floor
setup_task.sh formula: 'G2*30'; README.md 'Natural light': rating × 30 points
setup_task.sh CSV line: 'Alex,A,180,Yes,Yes,3,4,,,'; README.md data table shows Room A (Alex): 180
setup_task.sh CSV line: 'Blake,B,140,No,No,2,3,,,'; README.md data table shows Room B (Blake): 140
setup_task.sh CSV line: 'Casey,C,160,Yes,No,3,5,,,'; README.md data table shows Room C (Casey): 160
setup_task.sh CSV line: 'Drew,D,200,Yes,Yes,1,2,,,'; README.md data table shows Room D (Drew): 200
Calculated from weighting formula: Alex (880) + Blake (480) + Casey (760) + Drew (830) = 2,950

pi_items.verified_value: Yes - weighted scoring produces fair distribution: Alex $954.58, Blake $520.68, Casey $824.41, Drew $900.34
pi_items.source: Mathematical calculation confirms proportional distribution maintains $3,200 total with no rounding issues

privileged_info_summary: Task rent_split_calculator@1 is a synthetic task involving fair rent allocation. 4 synthetic rooms (Alex: 180 sq ft, Blake: 140 sq ft, Casey: 160 sq ft, Drew: 200 sq ft) with varying amenities must be scored using a weighted formula: 2.5 points/sq ft, +150 bathroom, +100 parking, +20 per floor level, +30 per light rating point. Total weighted score across all rooms equals 2,950 points (Alex 880, Blake 480, Casey 760, Drew 830). Total rent of $3,200 should be distributed proportionally: Alex $954.58 (29.83%), Blake $520.68 (16.27%), Casey $824.41 (25.76%), Drew $900.34 (28.14%). Task timeout: 180 seconds, max 12 steps, medium difficulty, sparse reward.
